posts.text: Surely in the 21st century, thought Jürgen Habermas, war should have been superseded? To his dismay, most discussions in the 2020s seemed to descend into fisticuffs or exchanges of fire  https://www.economist.com/obituary/2026/03/19/jurgen-habermas-hoped-rational-discussion-could-save-the-world?taid=69be67765e19590001dc55bd&utm_campaign=trueanthem&utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter

posts.text: I have some high value innovations that  Amazon basics will be all over.  Plus with his manufacturing plans he must consider the role of fractal graphene in the evolution of manufacturing.
